sources.finance_prices: Yahoo Finance via yfinance. Direct index tickers where available; MSCI World Health Care is proxied with iShares Global Healthcare ETF (IXJ) because public free real-time index levels are not consistently available.
sources.bls_oews: BLS OEWS May 2025 state tables: https://www.bls.gov/oes/tables.htm (XLSX link /oes/special-requests/oesm25st.zip)
sources.bls_ooh: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook 2024-2034: RNs 5% growth/$93,600 median; LPN/LVN 3% growth/$62,340 median; APRNs 35% growth/$132,050 median.
sources.ncsbn: NCSBN 2024 National Nursing Workforce Study: >138,000 nurses left since 2022; almost 40% intend to leave by 2029; RN intent 39.9%, LPN/VN intent 41.3% noted in NCSBN 2026 survey announcement.
sources.modeling_note: State shortage/supply-demand scores are derived planning indicators, not official BLS/NCSBN state shortage percentages. They combine OEWS employment/wage density with national NCSBN exit intent, BLS opening rates, and HRSA-style supply-demand framing. Replace with licensed HRSA/state board data when available.
